context.pre_match_notes: Ngannou returning to UFC-affiliated competition after PFL stint. Car accident recovery (knee and leg injuries, 2024). First competitive fight post-recovery. Unknown physical state — injury_warning_flag active. Ngannou KO power unchanged per training reports but movement and athleticism potentially compromised.

question: How does the injury_warning_flag affect the prediction when KO power is retained but mobility may be compromised?

verified_outcome.score: Ngannou KO Round 1 (KO power fully intact)
verified_outcome.key_variable: injury_flag partially offset by KO_power_retained — first round resolved before mobility limitation mattered
